classifications.human_question:
Decision needed:
  Define or approve expected behavior for EQ_MODULE_FIFO_SYNC_FLAGS.

Locked artifact rule:
  Requirement, SSOT/spec, FunctionalModel golden semantics, coverage goals, interface contracts, and performance targets require human approval before they change. RTL/TB/tests may be repaired automatically after the oracle is locked.

Evidence:
  SSOT refs: cycle_model, cycle_model.latency, cycle_model.pipeline.s4_update_flags, decomposition.units.flag_generation, function_model, function_model.transactions.output_rules
  Reason: module owns no function_model refs, so exact functionality cannot be compared

Options:
  A. Update SSOT with the intended behavior and regenerate FL/equivalence goals.
  B. Mark this behavior as not required and provide an explicit waiver/rationale.

Recommended default:
  Update SSOT, because RTL/TB expected values must remain source-of-truth driven.

Downstream effect:
  SSOT, FunctionalModel, equivalence goals, TB scoreboard, and coverage may change.
